notes: Server-level page list, automatic server connection (no per-browser Server API config), all settings server-side (Mailgun in encrypted DB), Revisions ledger with View/Restore, faithful HTML import with CSS preservation, multipart save (WAF-proof), square media picker + 16:9 desktop editor, FAQ/accordion editing, Privacy Policy generator, and self-update across the engine files.
apiNote: admin/api.php holds this site's secrets (API token) and is never auto-updated. If a release changes api.php, update it by hand.
